channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Saturday, June 6, 2026
item.description: Two threads dominate this Saturday and deserve your full attention, Midya. First, Canada's new federal AI strategy — anchored in university research and CIFAR Chair expansion — is a direct signal that Canadian institutions are about to receive new mandates, new funding pressure, ...
